ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with all fields legible. ICC Certificate of Origin issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce, Göteborg.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with all fields legible. Invoice SI02744 issued by Källbergs Industri AB.

lc_check.lc_validation_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number is SEG-26D-464763 which is a certificate reference, not an LC reference. No fields labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar bank term labels found.

locations_found.exact_text: Källbergs Industri AB, Skövdevägen 25, Box 73, 54522 Töreboda, Sverige

pairing_validation.reasoning: Criterion 2 met: Certifikatets consignor 'Källbergs Industri AB' can be identified in the invoice footer and header branding. Criterion 3 met: Certifikatets consignee 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' is explicitly named as the invoice addressee (Bill-to). No explicit invoice number reference in the certificate to verify criterion 1, but criteria 2 and 3 are satisfied.

candidates.section: Box 8 - Place and date of issue

consignor.certificate_value: Källbergs Industri AB, Box 73, SE-545 22, TÖREBODA, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Källbergs Industri AB, Skövdevägen 25, Box 73, 54522 Töreboda, Sverige (footer); KÄLLBERGS (header branding); VAT No.: SE556059176901

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Källbergs Industri AB' anywhere in invoice files
comparison_steps.result: FOUND - Name appears in invoice footer company address block, header branding, and VAT block

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignor name with invoice issuer name
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 'Källbergs Industri AB' (certificate) exactly matches 'Källbergs Industri AB' (invoice footer)

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignor country with invoice issuer country
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Certificate: 'Sweden', Invoice footer: 'Sverige' (Swedish for Sweden). Also confirmed by VAT prefix 'SE' in SE556059176901.

rules_applied.description: Group structure - consignor name found explicitly in invoice footer and header branding
Name verification - exact match after normalization
Country verification via indirect identifier - VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden
Country verification - Sweden (cert) = Sverige (invoice), confirmed by SE VAT prefix

evidence.description: Certificate consignor: 'Källbergs Industri AB' in Box 1
Invoice footer issuer: 'Källbergs Industri AB' with address in Töreboda, Sverige
evidence.raw_text: Källbergs Industri AB, Skövdevägen 25, Box 73, 54522 Töreboda, Sverige

evidence.description: Invoice VAT number with SE prefix: SE556059176901

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor 'Källbergs Industri AB' from Box 1 with country 'Sweden'. Invoice footer explicitly states 'Källbergs Industri AB' at 'Skövdevägen 25, Box 73, 54522 Töreboda, Sverige'. Header branding shows 'KÄLLBERGS'. VAT number prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden. The company name is an exact match. Country 'Sweden' matches 'Sverige' (Swedish language equivalent) and is further confirmed by SE VAT prefix per rule 4.1.2.1. Address differs slightly (certificate: Box 73, SE-545 22 TÖREBODA; invoice: Skövdevägen 25, Box 73, 54522 Töreboda) but per 4.1.5 address differences do not cause MISMATCH when name and country are verified. MATCH per rules 4.1.0, 4.1.2, 4.1.4.
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Källbergs Industri AB' is explicitly found in the invoice footer with matching address (Box 73, Töreboda) and country (Sverige = Sweden, confirmed by SE VAT prefix). Exact name match, country verified. MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawacho, Chofu-shi, Tokyo 182-0002, Japan
consignee.invoice_value: Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawa-cho, Chofu-Shi, Tokyo 182 0002, Japan (Bill-to and Ship-to)

comparison_steps.description: Identify the primary billing party in the invoice
comparison_steps.result: FOUND - Invoice top-left addressee: 'Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawa-cho, Chofu-Shi, Tokyo 182 0002, Japan'

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice bill-to name
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' exactly matches in both documents

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee country with invoice bill-to country

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification - primary billing field used
Address difference (Sengawacho vs Sengawa-cho) does not cause MISMATCH per rule

evidence.description: Certificate consignee: 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' in Box 2
evidence.raw_text: Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawacho, Chofu-shi, Tokyo 182-0002, Japan

evidence.description: Invoice bill-to: 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' at top-left of invoice
evidence.raw_text: Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawa-cho, Chofu-Shi, Tokyo 182 0002, Japan

evidence.description: Invoice Ship-to Address: 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' (same party, same address)
evidence.raw_text: Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawa-cho, Chofu-Shi, Tokyo 182 0002, Japan

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' from Box 2 with address '2-5-7 Sengawacho, Chofu-shi, Tokyo 182-0002, Japan'. Invoice bill-to (primary factoring field per 4.2.0.2) states 'Kewpie Egg Corporation, 2-5-7 Sengawa-cho, Chofu-Shi, Tokyo 182 0002, Japan'. Company name matches exactly. Country Japan matches exactly. Address difference: 'Sengawacho' (certificate) vs 'Sengawa-cho' (invoice) is a minor hyphenation difference in the same street name; per 4.2.4 address differences do not cause MISMATCH when name and country are verified. Postal code '182-0002' vs '182 0002' is minor formatting. MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' is found as the primary bill-to addressee in the invoice with country Japan matching. Minor address formatting differences (Sengawacho vs Sengawa-cho, 182-0002 vs 182 0002) do not affect the match. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers to match against invoice
comparison_steps.result: Certificate does not contain a separate article/item number field. The product code 'LPL-2L' is part of the goods description. Invoice has Item No. 1541103 which is not referenced in the certificate. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation and match against invoice
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Certificate: 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L'. Invoice description: 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L'. Exact textual match of the complete identity-bearing designation.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L' found exactly in invoice

evidence.description: Certificate goods description: 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L' in Box 6
Invoice item description: 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L' in item line 1

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 6 contains goods description 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L'. The certificate does not contain a separate article/item number (the '1541103' in the invoice is not referenced in the certificate, so Priority 1 article number matching is not applicable). Under Priority 2, the identity-bearing main designation is 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L' which is found exactly in the invoice description field for item line 1. Exact text match with no normalization required. MATCH per 4.3.3.
goods_description.motivation: Goods description 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L' in the certificate exactly matches the invoice item description 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L'. MATCH.

quantity.invoice_value: Total Net Weight 3.267 (interpreted as 3267 kg after thousands separator normalization); Item Qty: 3.267 Kg

comparison_steps.description: Certificate Box 7 states '3267 kg net'. Numeric value: 3267, unit: kg, weight category: net.
comparison_steps.result: Valid quantity identified: 3267 kg net weight

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '3267 kg net' which is the verification-grounding quantity.
comparison_steps.result: Verification basis confirmed: 3267 kg net from Box 7

comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value 3267 in invoice. Invoice shows: Item Qty '3.267' Kg, Total Net Weight '3.267'. The period in '3.267' needs interpretation.
comparison_steps.result: Analyzing numeric format: '3.267' in invoice context

comparison_steps.description: Invoice uses '3.267' for the quantity in Kg and for Total Net Weight. In European number formatting, '3.267' with a period as thousands separator = 3267. Both values are integers (no decimal part indicated). The period functions as a thousands separator. After normalization: 3267 Kg.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 3.267 normalized to 3267 after removing thousands separator (period). Certificate value 3267 kg net matches invoice Total Net Weight 3.267 (=3267) kg.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice also shows Total Gross Weight 3.365 (=3365 after normalization). Certificate states 'net'. Certificate NW 3267 matches invoice Total Net Weight 3267. GW is not stated in certificate so no contradiction.
comparison_steps.result: No contradiction - certificate specifies net weight which matches invoice Total Net Weight

rules_applied.description: Quantity requirement - certificate states numeric value 3267, unit kg, category net
Box 7 value '3267 kg net' used as verification basis
Weight category explicitly stated as 'net' in certificate
Thousands separator normalization - invoice '3.267' interpreted as 3267 (period as thousands separator)
Total weight in invoice - Total Net Weight 3.267 (=3267) matches certificate 3267 kg net

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7: '3267 kg net'. Numeric value 3267, unit kg, weight category net (explicitly stated). Invoice shows item quantity '3.267 Kg' and 'Total Net Weight 3.267'. The invoice also shows 'Total Gross Weight 3.365'. The period in '3.267' is interpreted as a thousands separator per rule 4.4.3.3: conditions met — (1) same item, (2) values are integers (no decimal part), (3) separator occurs only as thousands separator. After normalization: 3.267 → 3267. Certificate states 3267 kg net. Invoice Total Net Weight = 3267 (after normalization). The weight categories align: certificate explicitly states 'net', invoice label is 'Total Net Weight'. The values match exactly. No contradiction with Gross Weight since certificate does not claim a GW value. MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certificate states 3267 kg net weight. Invoice Total Net Weight is 3.267 which normalizes to 3267 after thousands separator removal. Weight category 'net' matches invoice label 'Total Net Weight'. Values are identical. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Interpret '3.267' as 3.267 (three point two six seven, i.e. approximately 3.3 kg)
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: This interpretation would yield approximately 3.3 kg which is implausible for a commercial shipment valued at EUR 62,073. The context (unit price 19 EUR/kg, total amount 62,073 EUR) confirms the quantity must be approximately 3267 kg. Additionally, the Total Gross Weight 3.365 follows the same pattern. The period functions as a thousands separator in European formatting.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin statement in invoice
comparison_steps.result: FOUND - Invoice states 'Country of origin: Sweden' directly below item description

rules_applied.description: Identification in invoice - 'Country of origin: Sweden' found as explicit origin statement
MATCH - origin country Sweden explicitly identified in invoice

evidence.description: Invoice explicit origin statement: 'Country of origin: Sweden'

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 states 'Sweden' as country of origin. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: Sweden' directly below the item description line for Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L. Exact text match of the country name 'Sweden'. Single origin country, no mixed origins. MATCH per 4.5.5.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate states origin 'Sweden'. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Exact match. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.result: NOT_APPLICABLE - No LC reference found in certificate
Single-page certificate and single-page invoice. Standard pairing.
PASSED - Consignor 'Källbergs Industri AB' found in invoice (criterion 2). Consignee 'Kewpie Egg Corporation' found in invoice (criterion 3).

rule_evaluation_log.description: Group structure - consignor search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH - 'Källbergs Industri AB' found in invoice footer and header branding
MATCH - SE prefix in VAT number confirms Sweden
Primary billing field identified - Kewpie Egg Corporation
NOT_APPLICABLE - certificate does not contain separate article numbers
MATCH - 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L' exact match
MATCH - Total Net Weight 3267 matches certificate 3267 kg net
MATCH - 'Country of origin: Sweden' found explicitly

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Källbergs Industri AB i Sverige bekräftas i fakturan, mottagaren Kewpie Egg Corporation i Japan anges som fakturamottagare, varubeskrivningen 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L' är identisk, nettovikten 3267 kg matchar fakturans uppgift, och ursprungslandet Sverige anges uttryckligen i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor Källbergs Industri AB identified in invoice footer and branding with SE VAT prefix confirming Sweden. Consignee Kewpie Egg Corporation matched as invoice bill-to party in Japan. Goods description 'Dried Egg Yolk LPL-2L' is an exact text match. Quantity 3267 kg net matched after thousands separator normalization of invoice value 3.267. Country of origin Sweden explicitly stated in invoice. No discrepancies found.
non_blocking_observations: Minor address formatting differences in consignee: 'Sengawacho' (certificate) vs 'Sengawa-cho' (invoice) — hyphenation variant of same street name.

Consignor address in certificate (Box 73, SE-545 22 TÖREBODA) uses slightly different format than invoice footer (Skövdevägen 25, Box 73, 54522 Töreboda) — same postal address with street name added in invoice.
Invoice uses European number formatting with period as thousands separator (3.267 = 3267).

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura
